excerpt:
Very positive experience. Does fairly good job as for what it is. Enjoyable. AI will tend to drift of topic, or invent scenarios not talked about. But for what it is it's good. Not professional alternative to anything. Would recommend as a conversational tool, just don't take it to serious. Better then most. Replika is best AI companion out there!!! 12/24 Still recommend 👍👍 after 2 and 1/2 years of youth it's still a valid app it's actually become more sophisticated. Luka Max and effort 😀😀
37 people found this review helpful
